Frisco, Texas

Premium Sushi.
Elevated Experience.

Fresh fish flown in regularly. Traditional Japanese craftsmanship. An upscale dining destination in the heart of Frisco — setting a new standard north of Dallas.

Reserve a Table View Our Menu
Reserve a Table View Our Menu

About Us

Welcome to Musashi

Based out of Frisco, Texas, Musashi is an upscale casual Japanese restaurant specializing in sushi, izakaya, and tapas-style dining. We offer items ranging from small plates provided over several courses, to interactive tabletop tastings. Our dishes can be paired with a diverse selection of Japanese sake and whisky to elevate the overall experience.

Our goal is to present the community a reliable option to enjoy quality cuisines and service, while being able to relax in a more elegant yet inviting atmosphere. Here at Musashi, we apply a strong emphasis on education, first principles, along with uncompromising standards for craftsmanship, ensuring each visit is meaningful and memorable.

4:00 pm – 10:00 pm

Fri – Sat

Sun

11:00 am – 10:00 pm

Mon – Fri

Celebrate With Us

Private Events

Planning a birthday, corporate dinner, or special celebration? Musashi offers an elevated setting for private and group events. Let us craft an unforgettable experience tailored to your occasion.
